REMARK: AS TO THE FEB-15-2024 EX PARTE HEARING RE: PETITIONER'S APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY RESPONDENTS SHOULD NOT BE COMPELLED TO COMPLY WITH INVESTIGATIVE SUBPOENAS ISSUED BY THE LABOR COMMISSIONER, THE COURT DENIES THE PETITIONER'S APPLICATION WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO PETITIONER FILING A REGULARLY-NOTICED MOTION WHICH SHOULD BE NOTICED FOR THE COURT'S 9:00 A.M. DISCOVERY CALENDAR. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
